Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary
Concepts
Buffer Fundamentals Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer Nokia SR (FP4/FP5) Nokia Access/Agg

Penguin Computing Arctica 4804x

The Penguin Arctica 4804x is built on the Broadcom Trident+ (BCM56840) ASIC.

Field Value
Ports 48 SFP+ and 4x QSFP
Total Buffer 9 MB

Queue and per-port buffer details not confirmed from Penguin documentation.

References

  • Penguin 4804x Datasheet

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
